summary: Deep clone pass completed against sitemap, product pages, provided screenshots, and browser verification.
implemented: Site inventory crawler for sitemap/menu/footer/internal public links.
Product media crawler with per-product image/video gallery data.
Product detail gallery with vertical thumbnails, image/video slides, inline autoplay video, and variant/cart controls.
Product detail lower content: service strip, review article, feature/spec table, review summary, comments, related products.
Category page hero, tabs, toolbar, product grid, guide banner, and long copy block.
Cart/checkout page with coupon panel, cart table, billing form, order review, COD/bank options, and backend submit.
Backend order persistence to data/orders.json plus /api/orders and /admin/orders.
Internal link handling to avoid redirects back to taynguyensoul.vn.
remainingGaps: A true pixel-perfect clone for all 241 public URLs is not complete; non-core pages still use reusable local templates unless individually implemented.
Blog/policy/contact pages are routed locally, but many article bodies are summarized instead of exact full source page content.
WooCommerce account login, payment gateway, shipping-rate rules, province/ward dynamic data, coupons, and real order emails are demo implementations only.
Some YouTube iframe overlays cannot be fully hidden by code due to YouTube player restrictions; native mp4 videos render cleaner.
The original site has many third-party floating widgets and external review embeds; the clone uses static/local equivalents to keep it functional offline.
